programme.desc: When the four members of the Mark family are found murdered in their home, police suspect someone close to the family is responsible. The bizarre truth will shake the small town of Cedar Falls and devastate the surviving members of the Mark family.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Hearts of Darkness
programme.desc: In what became known as "The Crime of The Century," a boy from one of Chicago's wealthiest families is kidnapped and found murdered. The ensuing investigation zeroes in on the wealthy, thrill-seeking college students Nathan Leopold and Richard Loeb.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Devil's Advocate
programme.desc: St. Paul, MN, 1963: Carol Thompson, church-going wife and devoted mother of four, is found in a bloody heap on her neighbor's doorstep. Now detectives must peel away the layers of her picture-perfect life to reveal the painful secrets the 1960s housewife.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Night Alone
programme.desc: College sophomore Gina Tenney is thrilled to be living all on her own. That is until she discovers she's got a stalker. And when she and her tormentor finally come face-to-face, it brings an even bigger surprise: this secret admirer is no stranger.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Coming for Me
programme.desc: With a serial killer on the loose in Arlington, TX, 22-year-old Adriane Fields can't shake the chilling suspicion that she's next on the list. Crippled by fear, she moves across town, only to come face-to-face with what she feared most.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1782 Farmhouse Redo
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his crew are called in to transform a dated kitchen and unfunctional dining room in a 1700s farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Master Suite Rework
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to open up a cramped master suite and rework the layout to make room for a huge walk-in shower. He and his team hope to expose a hidden original fireplace and find some additional stone in the bathroom.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1798 Living Room Switch
programme.desc: A couple with a home built in 1798 enlists Jeff to transform their original living room into a dining room to fit their growing family. Then, Jeff and the crew uncover an amazing surprise while stripping down an original wood mantel.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1800s Dining Room Discoveries
programme.desc: A couple calls on Jeff to restore every ounce of character he can find in their historic home. They also want him to bring a little history into their 1970s living room addition. Jeff finds not one, but two big surprises hidden in the dining room.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Exterior
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin is called on to restore the exterior of an 1802 farmhouse. Jeff and his team uncover a historic stone path, re-create the original shutters and build a post and beam style front porch. They also add a rustic entertainment area.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1802 Farmhouse Overhaul
programme.desc: Jeff is challenged to bring out the history in an 1802 farmhouse that has had a number of questionable renovations throughout its 200 years. His clients want original stone and ceiling beams in the dining room and an overhaul of the fireplace.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1825 Family Room Fix
programme.desc: Jeff is tasked to restore a crumbling family room and adjacent sun room in an 1825 stone home. He and his team bring in a stunning bluestone floor and create tons of built-in storage. They transform the sun room into an airy home office.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1839 Lofty Master Suite
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team are recruited to bring back some much-needed character to the master suite of an 1839 farmhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: New Jersey Mansion
programme.desc: The crew fights through layers of extravagant remodeling to salvage a governor's mansion in Livingston, NJ. The 1900s home challenges the team with unusual design nuances and well-built features. Later, Mike and Tay work on a build for a local bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lakeside Marina
programme.desc: The crew travel to Smith Mountain Lake to save parts off a sinking boat. While at the marina, they discover other boats on the property to salvage. At the warehouse, Mike builds a commissioned bar from wine barrels for a local winery.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: C&O Railway
programme.desc: The team travels to Clifton Forge, Virginia, to conquer C&O Railway's vast repair space. They work to salvage the steam engine repair plant by saving railway bases and corrugated glass. Later, they take apart a baby grand piano.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Hill Crest Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew extract a fireclay tub and window frame from a bed and breakfast. The crew also picks through a large auto graveyard. Key finds include a fire truck, a vintage cooler, and PBR sign.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Drayton Mill
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Terracotta Silo
programme.desc: The Dawgs struggle to take down a terracotta silo in Bedford, VA. While in town, Mike takes Tay and Grayson to visit the National D-Day Memorial. Back at the shop, Mike builds a coffee table from an old factory cart.

programme.title: Disaster Decks: The Deck Michelle Hates
programme.desc: Michelle and Courtney have four lively kids, but their postage-stamp sized deck can't fit a table on it big enough for the whole family.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Restored: 1920s Spanish Eclectic
programme.desc: A couple find a cute 1920s Spanish eclectic home in which they want to update the kitchen, add an ensuite bathroom and dressing room to the master, and plant a drought-tolerant garden, all staying in Spanish style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Aporkalypse Now
programme.desc: Noah visits the Great American Foodie Fest in Las Vegas and the Topfield Fair in Massachusetts.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: The hosts share the best holiday dishes they've ever eaten.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crazy Cheesy
programme.desc: We're bringing you the ooiest and gooiest cheese dishes this country has to offer. From fried cheese curds in Wisconsin to lasagna grilled cheese in Cleveland, we're trying them all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Prix/ Pirates Ahoy!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy and his fairy godparents have magical adventures.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Old Man and the C-/ Balance of Flour
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Force of Nature/ Viral Vidiots
programme.desc: At a park clean up, Timmy wishes the animals would pick up after themselves. The animals unite and launch an all-out attack on Timmy. Timmy helps his mom make a viral video. Crocker sees it and thinks Mom is a magical Breakfast troll.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad

programme.desc: Dad wishes he had a cooler job; Timmy enters a film festival to impress Trixie.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Hilinski's Hope
programme.desc: Seven months after the death of Washington State QB Tyler Hilinski, his parents cope with their grief and memories.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.desc: Martin tries to spend more time with Gina to help their relationship, but Gina is busy.

programme.title: Martin: The Closer I Get to You
programme.desc: As a last-minute fill in, Martin starts giving love advice on the show.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Shawn Takes a News Stand
programme.desc: Shawn buys the building's newsstand and hires Marlon with disasterous results.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Fatal Subtraction
programme.desc: Shawn finds his perfect woman, but Marlon tries to convince him otherwise.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Blood Is Thicker Than Watercolor
programme.desc: Marlon gets discovered by an art patron and creates his own unique paintings.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon find a baby on their doorstep, and one of them might be the father.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Loot
programme.desc: Everyone wants to split the huge stash of money they find in the building.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: The Liar's Club
programme.desc: Marlon gets jealous when Monique pretends to be married to Shawn.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon play a Halloween prank on Pops.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Head of State
programme.desc: Marlon is excited that U.S. President Clinton might visit the diner.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: Romeo Must Die
programme.desc: A man breaks out of prison to avenge his brother's death and gets caught in a war.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Movie: Merry and Bright
programme.desc: Two people work together to make their candy-cane factory profitable, but in the end, it's their love that turns a profit.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Palace
programme.desc: A woman agrees to help put on a skating pageant for a Christmas obsessed kingdom. Her joy, and love for the sport, catches the eye of the king, and they instantly fall for each other.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland
programme.desc: A woman brings her kids with her on a business trip to Memphis so they can go to Graceland. While there, she bumps into an old flame from her singing days in college. Together they make beautiful holiday music.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Around the Clock
programme.desc: A woman plans a Christmas to remember with her college friends, only to be thwarted by an opportunity she can't pass up. Much to her surprise, she is forced to team up with a man who has a completely different view of what Christmas really means.

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Club
programme.desc: Two busy strangers are thrown together to help an elderly woman recover her lost savings. While working together, the magic of the season prevails, leading the couple to discover something they have been missing, love.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: David Archuleta performs, Chef Evan Funke cooks squash stuffed pasta and Chef Karen Akunowicz prepares a cranberry orange crostata.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cleveland gets a second chance at love when he reunites with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hangover Part Tubbs
programme.desc: When Donna runs for the school board, she tries to keep an embarrassing Cleveland out of her campaign. But her efforts blow up in her face when he 'kills' a new friend playing 'The Hurt Locker' game.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery Special
programme.desc: Learning more about Blastic Plasmacytoid Dendritic Cell Neoplasm an aggressive and often fatal blood cancer.

programme.title: Battle of the Holiday Movie Stars
programme.desc: The stars of Lifetime Christmas movies are put to the test with holiday inspired challenges to determine who will be the king or queen of Lifetime Christmas as chosen by the experts... our fans!

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Arrangement
programme.desc: A rivalry heats up during a floral competition which leads to an unlikely romance.

programme.title: Movie: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly has never introduced her toy designer boyfriend Connor to her family and has only revealed that they live 'up north.' Holly knows she can't wait any longer and decides to bring Conner to meet her parents for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: Wrapped Up in Christmas
programme.desc: A mall Santa is trying to find his way after quitting his job, until he meets an unfriendly Christmas Grinch in the form of the mall manager.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Corn-fed Conundrum
programme.desc: Mark and Digger contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to rediscover his roots on the outlaw side. Mike and Jerry devise a plan to access a perfectly hidden still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: What Happens in the Woods
programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Crossing County Lines
programme.desc: With Extra Shine bonus scenes: Mark and Digger go across county lines to bootleg their triple-grain shine. Mark Huck uses bear scent to track down an intruder while Mike and Jerry fire up the 24-jar rig and discover the downside of backpressure.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners xXxmas
programme.desc: Tim and JT team up with Tickle's mother and daughter to create a Christmas surprise while Chico and Sondra head out to shoot the Christmas turkey.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners xXxmas
programme.desc: Tim and JT team up with Tickle's mother and daughter to create a Christmas surprise while Chico and Sondra head out to shoot the Christmas turkey.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Goldmine
programme.desc: Josh and Bill make a breakthrough on their underground still but eight tons of clay threatens to bury them alive. Mark and Jeff build a new copper still and head deep into the mountains to establish a new site. Tickle lures Tim back to their illegal site.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Renowned bear handler Jeff Watson says goodbye to his family and friends and sets out on an adventure into the wilderness of Southern Indiana. Out there, he will teach his two 700lb grizzly bears Bob and Screech how to survive on their own in the wild.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: To Teach a Bear to Fish
programme.desc: Jeff releases his bears, Bob and Screech into the habitat where he begins his lifelong dream of re-wilding them. However the first lesson, fishing, proves more difficult than Jeff imagined and Bob appears to be falling behind Screech.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: What About Bob?
programme.desc: Jeff teaches the bears to forage in the wild, but Bob's foot is still a concern. When the bear slashes Jeff in the arm he refuses medical care. After he loses the bears, Jeff is forced to think about the difficulty of them actually leaving the nest.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Bears on the Run
programme.desc: Jeff's unconventional hunting lessons fail to prepare Bob and Screech to hunt game in the wild, but he discovers they may be learning on their own. Meanwhile he reminisces about Grizzly Adams and agonizes over eventually parting ways with his bears.

programme.title: Project Grizzly: Teenage Bears
programme.desc: Jeff is pleased with Bob and Screech learning how to feed themselves. Now he teaches them how to den up for the winter. The grizzlies get territorial when Jeff's friend steps inside their habitat.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Land of Monsters
programme.desc: Snake hunter Dusty Crum wages war on thousands of invasive pythons killing the Everglades, backed by his one-of-a-kind team of snake hunters.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Night Terror
programme.desc: Rival snake hunters encroach on Dusty's hunting spot, so he and his team take a major risk by day and night hunting deep in the dangerous Sawgrass Plains.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fists Full of Snakes
programme.desc: Dusty and his team mount a critical hunt from a swamp buggy before racing south to the python-infested Ten Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Snakes in the Dark
programme.desc: Dusty leads the team to an abandoned missile factory near the epicenter of the snake epidemic that could hold the biggest concentration of pythons in the Everglades.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Enter the Super Snake
programme.desc: Dusty and team discover a frightening new hybrid Python species when they trek deep into the dense Python Pines to prevent the snakes from laying their eggs.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Candle Bar
programme.desc: Melissa and her groom share their love at a Hollywood inspired affair, while Laura's waterside wedding is accented with Penn State flair. Audrianna's guests enjoy the glamour at her boat house venue and Dee's guests make their own favours at a candle bar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool

programme.desc: Raven is cursed to be nice; meanwhile, Starfire is about to marry a pot of chili.

programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin meet Kiki and Quack, a pair of siblings that copy everything they do and say. When they realize their whole family is making money online imitating the Wattersons, they realize they need a solution.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potato
programme.desc: After lunch with Idaho, Darwin decides to stop eating potatoes. When he finds it harder to kick his favourite carb habit than he thought, Gumball decides to try to help.

programme.title: American Dad!: Minstrel Krampus

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The wardens encounter all types of people willing to stretch the truth to get out of hot water. Warden Parker searches for a trigger-happy shooter in a family neighborhood. Sergeant Spahr and Warden Lounder investigate a suspiciously shot turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Officer Eric Hannett and Officer Bill Boudreau chase down a likely deer poacher. Officer Glen Lucas makes a dangerous trek to the summit of Mt. Washington to rescue a stranded and injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Seeking Shelter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter without a permit, while Sgt. Lucas heads to a questionable deer kill site. Officer Holmes tries to extract a raccoon from a chimney and Officer Pierre executes his first under-ice recovery dive.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide

programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Dangerous Africans
programme.desc: Steve travels through Africa on foot to study some of the most notoriously dangerous African animals. He is charged by huge elephants, rolls up to a massive herd of buffalo, intimidates a pride of lions and is chased by large hippos.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Pocket Pets
programme.desc: See the world of puppies and kittens like never before.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Reese the Ripper
programme.desc: George and Beth consider their cat, Reese, to be the feline version of Jack the Ripper. One of his favourite targets happens to be Beth.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff operates on a dog rushed to the clinic after a growth on her neck ruptures. A family brings in their rabbit with mysterious growths on her side. The team performs a risky procedure on a pair of rescued miniature donkeys.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Surprise

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Orleans, Here We Come

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Face Off

programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend
programme.desc: After receiving a complaint, Burgess and Sorensen find the body of a young girl inside a baseball player’s home. There is conflict in the case when it is determined the player is friends with Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Paper Soldiers
programme.desc: A widow is suspicious of the circumstances surrounding her marine husband's last battle and Sam and Callen help to determine if there has been a cover-up.

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John
programme.desc: Conman John Meehan made national headlines after his crimes and their deadly final culmination were featured on the popular podcast 'Dirty John'. Keith Morrison sits down with Meehan's wife Debra Newell.

programme.title: Snapped: Janet Harrell
programme.desc: When a man is abducted from his front yard, evidence from a taser and a strange car accident lead them to the unlikeliest of suspects.

programme.title: Snapped: Shriya Patel
programme.desc: An arranged marriage goes awry, but was it the husband or his immigrant wife who set a deadly fire.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a suspect that shocks everyone.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Dying to See You
programme.desc: When a popular college student is found slain in the middle of campus, police suspect his friends and lovers might be involved.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: German foreign exchange student and soccer player, Diren Dede’s dream of studying in America came true when he began his junior year at a Montana high school. When he decides to play a reckless teenage game, the consequences turn deadly.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
programme.desc: A Las Vegas cocktail waitress and loving mother is murdered in her home, leading authorities to wonder if there was a predator at large. When detectives find the killer, it is clear that their investigation is just getting started.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: Snapped: Amanda Kaur
programme.desc: A young widow blames depression, but it may have her husband’s death been more sinister than a suicide.

programme.title: Snapped: Ruby Ann Ruffolo
programme.desc: A discovery in the woods leads police to a troubled marriage, a drug overdose and a deadly plot.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: Movie: The Night Before
programme.desc: Three best friends bring a debaucherous Christmas tradition to an end as they hit the town on Christmas Eve in search of an epic party, complete with a stash of mind-bending party favours.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsons Roasting on an Open Fire
programme.desc: Homer must save Christmas when bonuses are cut at the nuclear power plant and Marge is forced to use the family's Christmas savings on an emergency.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Genius
programme.desc: Bart swaps IQ tests with a smart classmate and ends up in a school for gifted kids.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Odyssey
programme.desc: Homer becomes a safety activist when he loses his job for causing an accident at the nuclear plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There's No Disgrace Like Home
programme.desc: After seeing how dysfunctional his family is at a company picnic, Homer enrols them all in therapy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the General
programme.desc: The school bully has been terrorizing the students, especially Bart, who has been singled out for standing up for Lisa. When Bart is beaten up after school, he and his friends form a plan to get back at Nelson.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moaning Lisa
programme.desc: Lisa is depressed about her problems, but perks up when she meets jazz musician Bleedin' Gums Murphy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Call of the Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer buys a beat-up motor home to take the family on a camping trip. But they quickly run into trouble when Homer gets lost and is mistaken for Big Foot.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Tell-Tale Head
programme.desc: To impress bad kids from school, Bart cuts off the head of Jebediah Springfield's statue.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Life on the Fast Lane
programme.desc: Marge vows to learn how to bowl when Homer gives her a bowling ball for her birthday. However, she is tempted to have an affair with her charming bowling instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Night Out
programme.desc: Using his new mail-order spy camera, Bart catches Homer dancing on stage with a stripper at a stag party.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Crepes of Wrath
programme.desc: Bart is sent to France for a student-exchange program, where is hosts are a family of winemakers who plan to use him as a slave. The student that stays with the Simpsons is a spy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty Gets Busted
programme.desc: Krusty is suspected of robbing the Kwik-E-Mart when a man dressed like him performs the deed. Bart doesn't believe his hero would rob anyone and vows to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Some Enchanted Evening
programme.desc: Marge and Homer go out for a night on the town, unknowingly leaving the children with a babysitter featured on America's Most Armed and Dangerous.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets an 'F'
programme.desc: When Bart is in danger of failing the fourth grade, he enlists the aid of the class brain to help him pass.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsons and Delilah
programme.desc: After trying a hair-growing formula, Homer gets promoted to an executive position.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons move into a haunted house that was built on a Native burial ground.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Cars in Every Garage and Three Eyes on Every Fish
programme.desc: Montgomery Burns decides to run for Governor in order to keep the nuclear plant open.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dancin' Homer
programme.desc: Homer becomes the Springfield Isotopes' mascot and the family is invited to Capital City.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dead Putting Society
programme.desc: Homer and Ned Flanders pressure their sons to win a miniature golf tournament.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Bart runs away from home when he burns Lisa's centrepiece and refuses to apologize.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Daredevil
programme.desc: Bart embarks on a death defying feat after seeing a daredevil perform at a truck rally.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Itchy, Scratchy & Marge
programme.desc: After watching an Itchy and Scratchy cartoon, Marge vows to eliminate violence on TV.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Hit By a Car
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns hits Bart with his car he is only willing to pay $100, Homer sues for more.

programme.title: The Simpsons: One Fish, Two Fish, Blowfish, Blue Fish
programme.desc: Homer believes he has only 24 hours left to live after he eats a deadly blowfish.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Way We Was
programme.desc: When the television goes out, Homer and Marge tell the story of how they first met in '74.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. Lisa and the 8th Commandment
programme.desc: Homer gets an illegal cable hook-up and Lisa refuses to watch for fear of losing her soul.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Principal Charming
programme.desc: Homer sets up a date between Principal Skinner and Selma, but Skinner ends up with Patty.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Dog Gets An 'F'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Old Money
programme.desc: Grandpa Simpson inherits money from his sweetie and decides to give it to the needy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: Homer tackles his weight problem; Marge is commissioned to paint a portrait of Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's Substitute
programme.desc: When Lisa's regular teacher falls sick, she develops a crush on the substitute teacher.

programme.title: The Simpsons: War of the Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge go to a marriage retreat at Catfish Lake where Homer only wants to fish.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Three Men and a Comic Book
programme.desc: Bart takes a part-time job to earn money to buy the first Radioactive Man comic book.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blood Feud
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns needs Bart's rare blood type, Homer wants to be compensated for it.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Lisa Goes to Washington

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Murderer
programme.desc: After having a lousy day at school, Bart accidentally stumbles into a mobster front.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Defined

programme.title: The Simpsons: Like Father, Like Clown

programme.desc: Tuvok and Bennet's shuttle crash lands on a sacred haven for the alien Drayan race.

programme.desc: A bizarre occurrence causes Neelix and Tuvok to arrive aboard the Voyager as one.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager: Resolutions

programme.title: Movie: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A little boy finds it hard to keep believing in Santa Claus, so he stays up late on Christmas Eve to listen for any sign of him. His efforts are rewarded by the sound of a train that whisks him and other children away to the North Pole.

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases
programme.desc: A couple struggles to spend Christmas with all four of their divorced parents when their vacation plans fall through.

programme.title: Movie: The Polar Express

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases
programme.desc: A couple struggles to spend Christmas with all four of their divorced parents when their vacation plans fall through.

programme.desc: When Camp Half-Blood is attacked and its protection compromised, Percy and his friends set off on a dangerous mission. They must recover the Golden Fleece from the Sea of Monsters in order to save their safe haven and stop an ancient evil from rising.

programme.desc: In freezing temperatures, Alaskans must build and maintain means of transportation.

programme.desc: Heavy rescue recovers a severely damaged trailer loaded with millions of plastic beads. Spring rains cause rock slides on Highway 1. When a B-train loaded with lumber drives off a cliff in order to avoid a boulder, Jamie's called in to recover it.

programme.desc: Young kangaroo Fergus gets a gut check in the love department.

programme.desc: Dr. Pol, his son Charles and Dr. Brenda try to keep up with an onslaught puppies, kittens and calves before operating on two 1,600 pound cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol Speed Ahead
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Charles rush to save a mother mare and foal and then help a dog with a badly slit throat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goats Gone Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol keeps busy as the unofficial vet for the town's county fair. The clinic helps Timmy, a goat with a blocked esophagus and Cooter, a hound dog with a bite from battling with another dog.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Raging Bulls
programme.desc: Charles is determined to upgrade the computer system at the clinic while Dr. Pol deals with escaping cattle, a wobbly dog that won’t stop walking in circles and an alligator with an attitude.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ark of the Covenant: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence discovered using the latest science might lead to one of the greatest discoveries of all time: the true hiding place of the Ark of the Covenant. Experts investigate the secret history of this biblical relic.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ark of the Covenant: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence discovered using the latest science might lead to one of the greatest discoveries of all time: the true hiding place of the Ark of the Covenant. Experts investigate the secret history of this biblical relic.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Fireball From Hell
programme.desc: When a series of accidental explosions erupt at a chemical factory, they completely destroy the area nearby, and now, new discoveries the real reasons behind the deadly chemical fireball that left a giant crater where there was once a building.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Trains Collide
programme.desc: After a high-speed collision of three trains during morning rush hour in London causes dozens of deaths, experts use the latest technology to investigate what caused this catastrophic crash and what secrets could prevent future disasters.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
